title: capsella trevirorum
intro: Capsella trevirorum, also known as Trebizond cress, is an annual plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family, closely related to mustard and cress. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Capsella trevirorum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve menstrual cramps. Capsella trevirorum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, or used fresh in salads and as a garnish.
